message:
style(fwc): mechanical rustfmt reformatting across test modules

Pure whitespace and line-length reformatting with zero semantic changes:

- readiness.rs: long assert! calls split across lines, array literals
  reformatted to one-item-per-line
- intent.rs: CompiledStep struct literals reflowed to one-field-per-line,
  assert_eq! calls split, WorkflowTruth::from_compiler() calls reflowed
- fallback_routing.rs: entry chain compacted, filter/max_by closures
  inlined and reflowed
- workflow.rs: one assert_eq! call reflowed across multiple lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
